changes_made.description: Rewrote SKILL.md to emphasize 'write a single Python script file, then execute it' workflow. Added complete copy-paste-ready script templates for both hypothesis testing (ANOVA + post-hoc + power analysis) and regression (OLS + VIF + prediction). Removed verbose explanation sections in favor of actionable code patterns. This fixed the hypothesis-testing task where gemini-3-flash was getting stuck in a tool-calling loop instead of writing and running a script.
